title: Storm Fury Combat
description: Lightning strikes become deadly combat zones where hostile mobs gain temporary electrical charge and chain damage to nearby entities.
body:
# Storm Fury Combat

When lightning strikes during thunderstorms, all hostile mobs within a 24-block radius become electrically charged for 30 seconds. Charged mobs deal increased damage and their attacks chain to nearby creatures within 5 blocks, spreading damage through electrical arcs.

## Mechanics

- **Charged State**: Mobs display electric particle effects while charged
- **Damage Chaining**: Melee attacks from charged mobs spread damage to entities within 5 blocks
- **Discharge**: Charged mobs have a small chance to release a lightning bolt when killed, damaging nearby entities
- **Weather-Based**: Effect triggers automatically during thunderstorms with no player commands required

## Combat Impact

Fighting near multiple mobs during storms becomes dangerous as damage chains unpredictably between creatures. This creates organic difficulty spikes tied to weather events rather than artificial mechanics.

## Technical Details

- Processing only occurs during active thunderstorms
- Uses scoreboard timers to track charge duration
- Optimized for server performance
